description: Prompts for character reference sheet slots and view-specific guidance.
sheet_prompt_prefix: Generate a clean full-body reference view of character shown in the picture, keeping face details, age, identity, outfit and hairstyle consistent, they must be same.

reference_slots.label: Sketch
reference_slots.prompt: Create a clean character sketch reference of a single person based on the provided image. Show the full body from head to toe, centered, with a neutral stance and clear silhouette on a plain studio background. Keep face details, age, identity, outfit and hairstyle consistent. No text or watermark.

reference_slots.label: Complex
reference_slots.prompt: Generate a clean full-body reference of the character shown in the sketch, keeping face details, age, identity, outfit and hairstyle consistent. Show a different pose in an urban environment, full body visible head to toe, subtle shadows, cinematic mood, photorealistic high resolution, detailed image. Avoid cropped or blurry results, deformed anatomy, text or watermarks.

reference_slots.label: Portrait
reference_slots.prompt: Generate a clean portrait of the character shown in the sketch. Head and shoulders, facing the camera with gentle eye contact and a neutral expression. Keep face details, age, identity, outfit and hairstyle consistent. Plain neutral background, subtle shadows, photorealistic high resolution, detailed image. Avoid cropped face, blurry results, deformed anatomy, text or watermarks.

reference_slots.label: Full body
reference_slots.prompt: Generate a clean full-body front view reference of the character shown in the sketch. The character faces the camera, standing naturally with feet visible and arms relaxed. Keep face details, age, identity, outfit and hairstyle consistent. Plain neutral background, subtle shadows, cinematic mood, photorealistic high resolution, detailed image. Avoid cropped or blurry results, deformed anatomy, text or watermarks.

reference_slots.label: Full body
reference_slots.prompt: Generate a clean full-body side view reference of the character shown in the sketch. The character is in true side profile, one hand raised above the head in greeting, the other behind the back, full body visible head to toe. Keep face details, age, identity, outfit and hairstyle consistent. Subtle shadows, cinematic mood, photorealistic high resolution, detailed image. Avoid cropped or blurry results, deformed anatomy, text or watermarks.
reference_slots.negative: front view, back view, facing camera

reference_slots.label: Full body
reference_slots.prompt: Generate a clean full-body rear view reference of the character shown in the sketch. The character is seen from behind, looking back over the shoulder toward the camera and gesturing to someone behind, full body visible head to toe. Keep face details, age, identity, outfit and hairstyle consistent. Subtle shadows, cinematic mood, photorealistic high resolution, detailed image. Avoid cropped or blurry results, deformed anatomy, text or watermarks.
reference_slots.negative: front view, facing camera, face visible

view_specific_prompts.portrait: Generate a clean portrait of the character shown in the sketch. Head and shoulders, facing the camera with gentle eye contact and a neutral expression. Keep face details, age, identity, outfit and hairstyle consistent. Plain neutral background, subtle shadows, photorealistic high resolution, detailed image. Avoid cropped face, blurry results, deformed anatomy, text or watermarks.
view_specific_prompts.profile: Generate a clean side profile portrait of the character shown in the sketch. True 90-degree profile, head and shoulders, clear silhouette, neutral expression. Keep face details, age, identity, outfit and hairstyle consistent. Plain neutral background, subtle shadows, photorealistic high resolution, detailed image. Avoid front view, blurry results, deformed anatomy, text or watermarks.
view_specific_prompts.full_front: Generate a clean full-body front view reference of the character shown in the sketch. The character faces the camera, standing naturally with feet visible and arms relaxed. Keep face details, age, identity, outfit and hairstyle consistent. Plain neutral background, subtle shadows, cinematic mood, photorealistic high resolution, detailed image. Avoid cropped or blurry results, deformed anatomy, text or watermarks.
view_specific_prompts.full_side: Generate a clean full-body side view reference of the character shown in the sketch. The character is in true side profile, one hand raised above the head in greeting, the other behind the back, full body visible head to toe. Keep face details, age, identity, outfit and hairstyle consistent. Subtle shadows, cinematic mood, photorealistic high resolution, detailed image. Avoid cropped or blurry results, deformed anatomy, text or watermarks.
view_specific_prompts.full_back: Generate a clean full-body rear view reference of the character shown in the sketch. The character is seen from behind, looking back over the shoulder toward the camera and gesturing to someone behind, full body visible head to toe. Keep face details, age, identity, outfit and hairstyle consistent. Subtle shadows, cinematic mood, photorealistic high resolution, detailed image. Avoid cropped or blurry results, deformed anatomy, text or watermarks.
view_specific_prompts.pose_walk: (walking pose:1.5), (mid-stride:1.4), (dynamic:1.3), one leg forward, arms swinging
view_specific_prompts.pose_arms: (arms crossed:1.5), (crossed arms:1.4), arms over chest, confident stance
view_specific_prompts.pose_sit: (sitting:1.5), (seated:1.4), sitting on chair, legs visible, relaxed position

view_specific_negatives.portrait: side view, profile, back view, turned away, full body, cropped face
view_specific_negatives.profile: front view, facing camera, back view, looking at camera, frontal
view_specific_negatives.full_front: cropped, partial body, sitting, side view, back view, close up
view_specific_negatives.full_side: front view, back view, cropped, facing camera
view_specific_negatives.full_back: front view, side view, face visible, looking at camera
view_specific_negatives.pose_walk: standing still, static, sitting, arms at sides
view_specific_negatives.pose_arms: arms at sides, arms down, hands in pockets
